name: Movie Night
tagline: Settle the genre war once and for all.

items.text: A slick heist thriller where the crew's plan falls apart in the third act
A sprawling space opera with warring dynasties and a chosen pilot
A tense courtroom drama that turns on one buried piece of evidence
A zombie comedy where the survivors argue more than they run
A rain-soaked noir with a detective who narrates his own bad decisions
An underdog sports story with a washed-up coach and a ragtag team
A slow-burn haunted house film where the house is the least scary part
A time-loop story where the loop is a metaphor the hero refuses to see
A hand-drawn animated epic about a kingdom at the edge of a map
A cold-war spy film that is mostly people lying quietly in rooms
A kaiju film where the city's insurance adjusters are the real heroes
A road-trip dramedy with a broken family and a breaking-down van
A martial-arts revenge tale with one unbroken hallway fight
A found-footage horror where the camera work is suspiciously good
A backstage musical where the show must go on despite everything
A slow western that is all buildup to one three-minute standoff
